description: A team wants to have a pre-game pyrotechnics display. The event manager must ensure it is done safely.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects and contracts with an approved vendor.

nodes.task_description: Secure all necessary permits from the local fire department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully obtains the required permits.

nodes.task_description: On game day, coordinate with the vendor and the fire department to ensure all safety protocols are followed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent oversees the safe execution of the display.
